steps.t: Ale can be found near Foreman Mögr in the Twenty-first Hall. You should collect some ale and bring it to the workers and guards so that they may celeb…
Dwarf-builders and guards can be found around the Twenty-first Hall. You should bring ale to the builders and guards on behalf of Foreman Mögr, who be…
Reinn is in the Twenty-first Hall of Moria, not far from Mögr. You should bring ale to Reinn.
Foreman Mögr is in the Twenty-first Hall of Moria. You should speak with Mögr.
